title.en: Only Ye Tian himself knew that he was much stro...

content.en:
The outside world has been in the world for millions of years, and Ye Tian has been practicing in the Time Pagoda for tens of billions of years.

Of course, time has no meaning for the True Monarchs, after all, they have already lived for eternity.

In just a million years, the outside world has not changed much, and even the half-step True Ancestor is still so much, and there is not an additional one.

After all, if there were no other opportunities, it would be extremely difficult to become a half-step True Ancestor.

Ye Tian is still the number one on the True Monarch List, and no one knows what level his strength has reached.

Only Ye Tian himself knew that he was much stronger now than before.

Now he had cultivated the Golden Ape Alchemy Technique to the consummation realm, which had already far surpassed the ninth layer of the Xuanxuan Jue True Spirit Chapter, reaching an incredible level.

But even so, Ye Tian's physical body still hadn't reached the limit level.

In addition, Ye Tian's three Origin Divine Powers of God Extermination, Divine Power, and Blood River True Body have all been cultivated to the consummation realm, and the three-element unity has also reached the consummation realm.

The technique of the Golden Eye Realm was also cultivated to the consummation realm by Ye Tian!

The prototype of the avenue has now been raised to 99,999 meters, which is the ultimate of the prototype of the avenue, and the further is 100,000 meters, which is a complete avenue.

As for the width of the prototype of the Great Dao, it has now reached an incredible level, because Ye Tian has cultivated a large number of Chaos Divine Powers, which he has collected from someone and cultivated them one by one.

But Ye Tian also found that no matter how many Chaos Divine Powers he cultivated, the rudiments of the Great Dao that he could condense in the end were limited.

Now, the length of his avenue is 99,999 meters, and the width is 99,999 meters.

Therefore, the whole prototype of the avenue looks like a small world.

This is the ultimate avenue prototype formed by the Endless Dao, if the prototype of the other avenues collides with Ye Tian's avenue prototype, it will definitely be easily shattered.

In addition to these, Ye Tian also created another Origin Divine Power through the Chaos Divine Power of the Time and Space Shock Technique-Earthquake Sky!

The power of the earthquake sky is very strong, much higher than the grade of the three origin divine powers of God Extermination, Divine Power, and Blood River True Body.

Although there is no specific ranking of the Origin Divine Powers, after all, the Origin Divine Powers cannot be inherited, and others have no way to know the content of these Origin Divine Powers, so there is no way to give a specific ranking.

There is also Xu Zhenzu who does not expose his origin supernatural powers at all, and it is even more difficult to analyze which kind of origin supernatural powers are powerful.

There is no specific ranking, but there is still a rough level division of the Origin Divine Power.

The countless forces of Chaos roughly divide the Origin Divine Power into four levels, the weakest being the lower-grade Origin Divine Power, followed by the middle-grade Origin Divine Power and the high-grade Origin Divine Power.

The strongest is the best Origin Divine Power!

It is rumored that the true ancestors who can master the best origin supernatural powers are all existences that can skip the level and fight with the Dao Ancestor, and there are even outstanding people who can jump over the level to kill the weaker Dao Ancestor.

But there are too few True Ancestors like that!

Ye Tian's God Destroyer, Divine Power, and Blood River True Body are strictly speaking, low-grade Origin Divine Powers, which are also the Origin Divine Powers created by most True Ancestors.

At the beginning, these three Origin Divine Powers could reach the level of lower-grade Origin Divine Powers, but in these years, Ye Tian has also been improving these three Origin Divine Powers step by step, and now they are also at the top level of the lower-grade Origin Divine Powers.

And the Origin Divine Power of Zhenkong is different, it can definitely be regarded as a medium-grade Origin Divine Power, which shows its strength.

For so many years, Ye Tian had spent most of his time creating the Origin Divine Power of Zhenkong, so he wasted a lot of time and only created this Origin Divine Power.

If it is regarded as the Origin Divine Power of the Three-Element Integration, Ye Tian now has five Origin Divine Powers, and this number is definitely the top among the True Ancestors.

"Other True Monarchs, even if they are the True Monarchs who will be promoted by the Ten Star Gods, they have already been promoted to the limit of True Monarchs when they cultivate to my level, and they are working hard to break through the half-step True Ancestor, but I still underestimate my potential, even if it is a chaotic alchemy technique like the Golden Ape Alchemy, there is no way to advance my physical body to the extreme!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He now has two options, one is to use various resources to increase the strength of the physical body, and advance to the extreme of the physical body step by step.

But it's a time-consuming road!

In the midst of chaos, many True Monarchs cultivated for countless years before they could barely advance their physical bodies to the extreme, and the time it took was not billions of years or tens of billions of years, but also many cosmic eras!

Even if Ye Tian didn't lack resources, if he wanted to raise his physical body to the extreme, he didn't know how long it would take, after all, the closer he got to the limit, the longer it would take.

The second path is to cultivate a more advanced Chaos Alchemy Technique, once you practice to an extremely high level, you can raise your physical body to the extreme.

But Ye Tian knew very well that his foundation was too high, and it was estimated that there was no Chaos Alchemy Technique that could raise his physical body to the extreme, if he could cultivate the True Ancestor Chaos Alchemy Technique, he could easily improve to the extreme of his physical body.

However, if you don't reach the True Ancestor realm, you can't cultivate the Chaos Alchemy Technique at the True Ancestor level, because that level of Chaos Alchemy requires the power of the True Ancestor to cooperate.

Ye Tian was not satisfied with cultivating the True Ancestor level Chaos Alchemy Technique now, and there was no way to use the True Ancestor Level Chaos Alchemy Technique to improve the strength of his physical body.

Therefore, if Ye Tian chose this path, he would have to create a top-notch Chaos Alchemy Technique that suited him.

But if you want to create a top-notch Chaos Alchemy that suits you, you can't do it with a high level of understanding, but you need a lot of Chaos Alchemy to learn from!

At present, Ye Tian had only mastered a small amount of Chaos Alchemy Technique, some of which he had obtained from the ruins of the Heavenly Ape Sect, and some of which had been obtained from the Little Wind King Hall of Black Wind Mountain.

But these Chaos Alchemy Techniques are simply not enough, and it is undoubtedly a fool's dream to want to borrow from these Chaos Alchemy Techniques to create a more top-notch Chaos Alchemy Technique.

If this name was really simple, wouldn't those Dao Ancestors be able to create even more top-notch Chaos Alchemy Techniques?

It is impossible for the Void Heaven One Vein to use the Xuanxuan Technique as a Chaos Alchemy Technique, but to use a better Chaos Alchemy Technique.

"I need more Chaos Alchemy, even if it's a broken Chaos Alchemy, that's fine!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

In the following days, Ye Tian asked Yanglong Zhenjun to collect some Chaos Alchemy for him, and no matter how incomplete the Chaos Alchemy Technique was, it could also be traded.

However, there are very few True Monarchs who are truly willing to trade Chaos Alchemy, because many Chaos Alchemy Techniques require an oath and cannot be used for inheritance, let alone trading.

The Chaos Alchemy that is really used for trading must have an inheritance, so that it can be traded, or you can get the Chaos Alchemy that does not require you to make an oath.

Although it was difficult to collect, in a short period of time, Yang Long Zhenjun also collected dozens of Chaos Alchemy Techniques for Ye Tian, plus Ye Tian also exchanged or traded dozens of Chaos Alchemy Techniques from the Void Heaven Palace.

It's a pity that the grade of these Chaos Alchemy Techniques is relatively low, and their usefulness is not very great, but at least they are also somewhat useful.

"It seems that the hope is still on the ruins, I wonder if there will be new ruins?"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Hundreds of thousands of years have passed, and Ye Tian has created another Origin Divine Power in the Time True Tower-Void Shifting!

This is an origin divine power involving space and speed, which has increased Ye Tian's extreme speed by nearly ten times at once, his survivability has increased greatly, and his strength has also increased a lot.

And at this moment, what Ye Tian had been looking forward to for a long time happened.

Another relic has been born!
